Settings.Title: Settings
Settings.SuppressNotifications: Suppress notifications and audio while in Do Not Disturb
Settings.NotificationDurationHelp: Controls how long notification toasts stay visible. Slider: 0.5-20s, Input: 0.5-30s.
Settings.OfflineAutomatic: Offline is automatic only and cannot be selected.
Settings.NotificationBellFlashHelp: Flash the bell icon for 10 seconds when notifications arrive
Settings.LockBlurHelp: Controls blur strength while locked. 0 = no blur, 10 = maximum.
Settings.ScreenCaptureWarning: Windows-only; older/legacy capture tools may not honor this.
Settings.AudioHelp: Configure volume levels for different types of sounds. Main Volume acts as a master control, while individual channels allow fine-tuning of specific sound categories.
Settings.SystemTrayHelp: Control how Zer0Talk behaves with the Windows system tray.
Settings.ShowSystemTrayIconHelp: Display Zer0Talk icon in the Windows system tray for quick access
Settings.MinimizeToTrayHelp: Close button will minimize to system tray instead of exiting the application
Settings.RunOnStartupHelp: Automatically start Zer0Talk when Windows starts (minimized to tray)
Settings.HotkeyInstructions: Click a hotkey field and press your desired key combination. Conflicting assignments will be rejected.
Settings.LockApplicationHelp: Quickly lock the app to protect your privacy
Settings.ClearMessageInputHelp: Instantly clear all text in the message input box
Settings.HotkeyTipsText: Avoid system hotkeys like Alt+F4, Ctrl+C, Win+L, etc. Common safe combinations use Ctrl, Ctrl+Shift, or Ctrl+Alt with function keys or letters.
Settings.OSScalingMessage: For UI scaling, use your operating system's display scaling settings.
Settings.AdditionalLanguagesMessage: Additional languages will be added in future updates.
Settings.AccessibilityOSMessage: Most accessibility features are controlled by your operating system:
Settings.DisplayScalingPath: Windows Display Settings > Scale and layout
Settings.CursorSizePath: Windows Settings > Accessibility > Mouse pointer and touch
Settings.ArrowKeysDescription: – Navigate within lists, menus, and dropdowns
Settings.NavigationHelp: All windows and panels support full keyboard navigation. Focus indicators will highlight the active control.
Settings.FontSmoothingMessage: Font smoothing is controlled by your operating system. Change it in your OS display settings.
Settings.PerformanceWarningText: Logging causes significant performance degradation. Only enable when actively tracking down problems or debugging issues. Disable immediately after troubleshooting is complete.
Settings.PurgeAllLogsTooltip: Delete all log files in logs directory (ephemeral debug data)
Settings.PortDescription: The port number Zer0Talk uses for P2P connections. Default is 26264. Changing this requires restarting the application.
Settings.EnableDedicatedPeerNode: Enable as dedicated peer node (requires port forwarding)
Settings.EnablesUPnP: • Enables UPnP port mapping for WAN reachability (requires router support)
Settings.MakesNodeAccessible: • Makes your node accessible from outside your local network
Settings.ImprovesConnectivity: • Improves direct P2P connectivity for all peers
Settings.DoesNotRelay: • Does NOT relay encrypted message traffic - only helps with NAT traversal
Settings.RequiresPortForwarding: • Requires manual port forwarding if UPnP fails (forward port 26264 TCP to this machine)
Settings.RelayDescription1: Relay servers provide last-resort connectivity when direct P2P and NAT traversal fail.
Settings.RelayDescription2: All messages remain end-to-end encrypted - the relay only forwards encrypted traffic.
Settings.EnableRelayFallback: Enable relay fallback for blocked connections
Settings.RequiresDedicatedRelay: • Requires a dedicated relay server with public IP or DNS name
Settings.ServerMustBeConfigured: • Server must be configured to accept Zer0Talk relay protocol connections
Settings.RelayFormat: • Format: hostname:port, IP:port, or a 16-character relay token discovered on your LAN
Settings.LeaveBlankToDisable: • Leave blank to disable relay fallback and rely on direct/NAT traversal only
Settings.LocationsEstimated: (locations are estimated and not even remotely accurate)
Settings.AboutBuiltWithAvalonia: Built with Avalonia UI - A cross-platform XAML-based UI framework for .NET
Settings.AboutSpecialThanks: Special thanks to the open source community for their contributions and support.
Settings.MessageBurnSecurityDesc: Choose the security level for burning conversations. Standard is faster, Enhanced provides maximum security.
Settings.MessageBurnStandardDesc: Overwrites data with random bits, lorem text, alternating patterns, and zeros.
Settings.MessageBurnEnhancedDesc: Overwrites with random data, 0xFF, 0x00, random, 0xAA, and 0x55 patterns for maximum security.
Settings.MessageBurnEnhancedTooltip: Maximum security, slower but more thorough
Settings.DangerZoneWarning: These actions are irreversible and will permanently delete your data.
Settings.WhatHappens: What happens when you delete your account:
Settings.MessagesDeleted: • All your messages will be permanently deleted
Settings.ContactListRemoved: • Your contact list will be removed
Settings.ProfileErased: • Your profile information will be erased
Settings.RemovedFromConversations: • You will be removed from all conversations
Settings.DeleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This will permanently delete your account and wipe all local data from this device.
Settings.TypeConfirmationCode: Please type the following code to confirm:
Settings.WhatHappensPurge: What happens when you purge all messages:
Settings.ConversationsDeleted: • Every conversation will be permanently deleted
Settings.OutboxRemoved: • All pending outbox messages will be removed
Settings.ArchivesOverwritten: • Encrypted archives will be securely overwritten
Settings.PurgeWarning: Securely delete every conversation and pending message from this device. This process overwrites the encrypted archives before removal making recovery impossible.
Settings.PurgeUseCase: Use this if you're decommissioning the device or need a clean slate.
Settings.ExportDataDescription: Download a copy of your data before deleting your account. This includes your messages, contacts, and settings.
Settings.SignOutDescription: Signing out will disconnect you from the application and require you to enter your passphrase again to access your account.
Settings.DataRemains: Your data will remain securely stored locally and will be available when you sign back in.
Settings.SignOutPrompt: Click the button below to sign out of your account. You'll need your passphrase to sign back in.
Settings.SecurityReminderText: Always sign out when using shared or public computers to protect your privacy and security.
Settings.FontHelp: Override the UI font family (leave blank for default)
Settings.DefaultPresenceHelp: Sets your default status when the app is running
Settings.AutoLockHelp: Automatically lock the app after inactivity
Settings.AutoLockMinutesHelp: Number of idle minutes before locking
Settings.LockOnMinimizeHelp: Lock immediately when the window is minimized
Settings.ShowPublicKeysHelp: Display public keys in profile views
Settings.BioHelp: Add a short profile bio shown to your contacts
Settings.StartMinimizedHelp: Launch Zer0Talk in the system tray instead of showing the main window
Settings.EnforceRAMLimitHelp: Limit memory usage for the app
Settings.RamLimitHelp: Maximum RAM usage in MB (0 = unlimited)
Settings.EnableGpuAccelerationHelp: Use hardware acceleration for rendering when available
Settings.EnforceVramLimitHelp: Limit GPU memory usage for the app
Settings.VramLimitHelp: Maximum VRAM usage in MB (0 = unlimited)
Settings.FpsThrottleHelp: Limit UI rendering frames per second (0 = unlimited)
Settings.RefreshRateThrottleHelp: Limit display refresh rate used by the app (0 = unlimited)
Settings.BackgroundFramerateHelp: Limit UI framerate when the app is unfocused
Settings.AutoTrimUILogHelp: Automatically trim the UI log to the limits below
Settings.DebugUiLogMaxLinesHelp: Maximum number of UI log entries to keep
Settings.DebugLogRetentionDaysHelp: How many days to retain debug logs
Settings.DebugLogSizeHelp: Maximum total size of debug logs before trimming
Settings.DedicatedPeerNodeHelp: Make this device act as a dedicated peer node
Settings.RelayFallbackHelp: Use a relay server when direct P2P connections fail
Settings.RelayServerHelp: Relay hostname:port, IP:port, or 16-character relay token (leave blank to disable)
Settings.SavedRelaysHelp: Add host:port endpoints or 16-character relay tokens for quick reuse
Settings.KnownDedicatedPeerNodesHelp: Add a host:port peer node to prefer for discovery
Settings.AddBadActorIpHelp: Add a single IP address to block
Settings.AddIpRangeHelp: Add a CIDR IP range to block
Settings.StreamerModeHelp: Hides sensitive information like UIDs, public keys, and IP addresses. Toggle with hotkey while streaming.
Settings.StreamerModeHotkeyHelp: Toggle streamer mode to hide sensitive information

Dialogs.ConfirmLogout: Are you sure you want to log out?
Dialogs.ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
Dialogs.ConfirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear this?
Dialogs.UnsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?
Dialogs.BurnConversationMessage:
Burn conversation with {0}?

This process performs irreversible destruction using your configured security level (Settings → Danger Zone → Message Burn Security):
• Overwrites stored messages with multiple secure passes
• Applies cryptographically random and fixed bit patterns
• Deletes residual message and outbox files

Once completed, the conversation cannot be recovered.
Dialogs.ClearInvitesMessage: Are you sure you want to reject all pending contact invites? This cannot be undone.

MainWindow.OfflineMessage: You are offline. Messages will be sent when you reconnect.

ThemeEditor.Title: Zer0Talk Theme Editor
ThemeEditor.SystemAccentDescription1: Override OS-provided accent colors to prevent system colors from showing through (e.g., blue highlights).
ThemeEditor.SystemAccentDescription2: Leave empty to use system colors. Set all 4 for complete control. Click color preview to open picker.
ThemeEditor.SystemAltOverrides: System Alt Color Overrides (Layering and Depth)
ThemeEditor.SystemAltDescription1: Override OS-provided alternative layer colors used for layering, depth effects, and translucent overlays.
ThemeEditor.SystemAltDescription2: These control secondary backgrounds and layered UI elements. Typically translucent whites on dark themes.
ThemeEditor.SystemBaseDescription: These colors control background layers, surfaces, and core UI foundation elements.
ThemeEditor.SystemChromeOverrides: System Chrome Color Overrides (Window and Frame)
ThemeEditor.SystemChromeDescription: These colors control window chrome, frames, borders, title bars, and structural UI elements.
ThemeEditor.ColorOverridesDescription: Define custom colors for your theme. Click the color preview to open the color picker.
ThemeEditor.ClearGradientHelp: Set both colors to background color (removes gradient effect)

AccountCreation.Title: Create Account
AccountCreation.KeepOnTop: Keep this window on top of other windows
AccountCreation.PickUsername: Pick a username (6–24 chars). We'll generate a secure keypair and UID.

Unlock.Title: Zer0Talk Sign In
Unlock.RememberTooltip: Stores your passphrase securely. Do not enable this on shared devices.
Unlock.NewPassphraseWarning: Write down this new passphrase now. You will not be able to recover it later.

AddContact.Title: Add Contact
AddContact.EnterUID: Enter the contact's UID (no prefix). Discovery is automatic.

LogViewer.Title: Log Viewer
LogViewer.TrimTooltip: Apply debug maintenance settings to trim this log file
LogViewer.CopyPathTooltip: Copy the selected log's full path
LogViewer.OpenFolderTooltip: Open the logs folder in your file explorer
LogViewer.AutoscrollTooltip: Keep the view pinned to the latest log entries
LogViewer.RefreshToScan: Use Refresh to re-scan the logs directory.

LostPassphrase.Title: Lost Passphrase Recovery
LostPassphrase.Warning: This will generate a NEW passphrase and re-encrypt your data. Continue?
LostPassphrase.WriteDownWarning: Write down this new passphrase now. You will not be able to recover it later.
